evidence.summary: LSB gov.uk landing page (publications + regulatory news)

finding: Public standards exist; the regression itself is on internal engagement-letter outcomes (write-off rate by clause type).
method: Existence: SRA + ICAEW engagement-letter standards reachable as rule documents; statistical leg requires client data.
notes: Recipe needs an internal engagement-letter corpus + matched write-off ledger. Public data confirms the rules, not the regression coefficients.
